findings.message: Step 4 instructs creating plugins/claude-hud/config.json (new file), but Write is not in allowed-tools. Edit cannot create new files in Claude Code; only Write can.
Vague quantifier: 'within a few seconds' gives no actionable timeout threshold for deciding when output is a failure vs. slow.
'most common cause on macOS' implies an ordering claim not supported by data; reads as filler.
Description 'Configure claude-hud as your statusline' omits cross-platform detection, ghost-install cleanup, and runtime discovery that the command performs.
Command runs `gh repo star jarrodwatts/claude-hud` (or gh api PUT /user/starred/...) which makes an authenticated GitHub API mutation. Gated on explicit user consent.
devDependency @types/node uses ^ range (^25.6.0); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.
devDependency c8 uses ^ range (^11.0.0); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.
devDependency typescript uses ^ range (^6.0.3); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.

execAsync(cmd) calls Node's exec() which runs through /bin/sh. cmd is a user-provided string from --extra-cmd CLI arg. Shell injection is by design (user controls their shell), but exec() spawns an unnecessary shell wrapper.
Step 4 instructs creating plugins/claude-hud/config.json (new file), but Write is not in allowed-tools. Edit cannot create new files in Claude Code; only Write can.
Vague quantifier: 'within a few seconds' gives no actionable timeout threshold for deciding when output is a failure vs. slow.
'most common cause on macOS' implies an ordering claim not supported by data; reads as filler.
Description 'Configure claude-hud as your statusline' omits cross-platform detection, ghost-install cleanup, and runtime discovery that the command performs.

execAsync(cmd) calls Node's exec() which runs through /bin/sh. cmd is a user-provided string from --extra-cmd CLI arg. Shell injection is by design (user controls their shell), but exec() spawns an unnecessary shell wrapper.
Command runs `gh repo star jarrodwatts/claude-hud` (or gh api PUT /user/starred/...) which makes an authenticated GitHub API mutation. Gated on explicit user consent.
devDependency @types/node uses ^ range (^25.6.0); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.
devDependency c8 uses ^ range (^11.0.0); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.
devDependency typescript uses ^ range (^6.0.3); allows automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh installs.
